summary: Comprehensive testing of Calculator page functionality, quote submission, and dark mode text readability. All 13 test requirements PASSED. Backend API tests: 10/10 passed. Frontend Playwright tests: All calculator features working correctly.

issues: Badge has black text (rgb(0,0,0)) but is on yellow/orange gradient background - still readable, minor issue

passed_tests: 1. PASS: Calculator page loads with data-testid='calculator-page'
2. PASS: All 4 packages visible - Rebranding €349, Basis €500, Pro €900, Premium €1400
3. PASS: Pro package (€900) selected by default
4. PASS: Selecting Rebranding updates total to €349
5. PASS: Selecting Basis updates total to €500
6. PASS: Selecting Pro updates total to €900
7. PASS: Selecting Premium updates total to €1400
8. PASS: Extra pages counter works (+/- buttons) - €50 per page
10. PASS: 'Vraag offerte aan' button opens quote form modal
11. PASS: Quote form shows selected package and total price
12. PASS: POST /api/contact endpoint works - quote submission successful
13. PASS: Dark mode - all text readable (white/light on dark backgrounds)
14. PASS: PackagesPage check icons have dark:text-white (rgb(255,255,255))
15. PASS: Backend API tests - 10/10 passed (contact, admin, analytics)
critical_code_review_comments: Calculator page uses proper data-testid attributes for all packages and add-ons
Price calculations are correct: base package + add-ons
Quote form modal correctly displays selected package and total
POST /api/contact endpoint handles quote data with proper validation
Dark mode implementation uses Tailwind dark: variants correctly
All package names, prices, and check icons are white in dark mode
ThemeChooser popup appears on first visit with 'Licht' and 'Donker' options
seed_data_creation: Test contact submissions created with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20: Calculator page fully tested. (1) All 4 packages work: Rebranding €349, Basis €500, Pro €900, Premium €1400. (2) Add-ons work: extra pages €50/page, multiLanguage €200, maintenance €25/month, etc. (3) Quote form modal opens via 'Vraag offerte aan' button, shows package selection, submits to POST /api/contact. (4) Dark mode: all text is white/light, check icons are rgb(255,255,255). (5) ThemeChooser popup on first visit - click 'Licht' or 'Donker' to dismiss. (6) Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_calculator_api.py.
